newsFeed.title: What Jobs Will AI Replace? - snhu.edu
newsFeed.summary: The article raises awareness about AI's potential to replace jobs but does not provide specific insights or developments that would accelerate or delay the process significantly.

dailyPulse.title: Daily signal pulse
dailyPulse.preview: A quick read on the latest pulse, led by What Jobs Will AI Replace? - snhu.edu.
dailyPulse.body: This update leans defensive, with 1 delays against 0 advances, so the latest coverage is giving more weight to friction, safeguards, or slower rollout dynamics. The clearest drag comes from "What Jobs Will AI Replace? - snhu.edu" (AI Jobs), which acts as the main anchor on the feed. Rather than accelerating straight ahead, the day’s signal mix implies more resistance and more reasons for the clock to pause. Updated 2026-02-13T12:00:00.000Z, with the macro replacement estimate at 49.1%.
